collection_method: Automated scraping using the 'google-play-scraper' Python library, targeting the newest reviews.
cleaning_decisions: Removed duplicate reviews based on text content.
Filtered out reviews with fewer than 3 words after preprocessing to ensure quality.
Converted all numeric values (e.g., '5') to text (e.g., 'five') using num2words.
Standardized text via lowercase conversion and punctuation removal.
Applied NLTK WordNetLemmatizer to reduce words to their dictionary base forms.
Removed standard English stop words to focus on sentiment-bearing terms.
